name: Andrews Regional Recreation Center
description: Andrews Regional Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Andrews, SC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Beck Recreation Center
description: Beck Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Georgetown, SC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Choppee Recreation Center at Northwest Regional Park
description: Come play pickleball at Choppee Recreation Center at Northwest Regional Park in Georgetown, SC! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: East Bay park
description: East Bay park is a place to play pickleball in Georgetown, SC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.

name: Litchfield Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Litchfield Pickleball in Pawleys Island, SC! There are 11 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Litchfield Racquet and Paddle
description: Litchfield Racquet and Paddle is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pawleys Island, SC. There are 11 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $7 per player fee, 90 minute court reservation.

name: Tradition Golf Club
description: These are private courts available to Tradition residents and their guests

name: Waccamaw Regional Recreation Center
description: There are numerous lines on the court for basketball and other sports.
fees: Fee required — Free for locals.  $2 for visitors
